_meta.bootstrap_failure_exception: When github_api_live returns an empty/null/failure-marker value (destination size: 0, fork: false), github_api_live_upstream is used as fallback for that field

bootstrap_status.rationale: Destination has size: 0 and fork: false. No template content was propagated. github_api_live is unconditionally authoritative for the destination's actual state.
bootstrap_status.action_required: Re-plan bootstrap phase to propagate template content from academicpages/academicpages.github.io to bugmaker00/My-Homepage

canonical_owner_repo.rationale: Destination retains its own namespace identity. github_api_live wins unconditionally for this field. The upstream template path is recorded separately in upstream_template_identity.

upstream_template_identity.rationale: Destination template_repository field is absent because the bootstrap failed. Bootstrap-failure exception applies; github_api_live_upstream wins. Upstream self-identifies as is_template: true (repo_id: 68287594, MIT license, 16759 stars, last push 2026-04-08T17:19:38Z).
upstream_template_identity.rejected_candidate: (not set — bootstrap failed; template_repository field absent on destination)

description.chosen_value: Github Pages template based upon HTML and Markdown for personal, portfolio-based websites.
description.rationale: Destination description is empty (bootstrap failed → exception applies). Upstream API description is the intended inherited value pending user customisation after a successful bootstrap.

candidates_considered.value: Github Pages template based upon HTML and Markdown for personal, portfolio-based websites.
Academic Pages is a GitHub Pages template for personal and professional portfolio-oriented websites.
candidates_considered.disposition: corroborating — consistent in meaning; superseded by upstream API field per priority order

default_branch.rationale: Unchallenged — both github_api_live and github_api_live_upstream agree on 'master'. github_api_live is cited as primary per convention.

language.rationale: Destination language 'HTML' is only an initialization artifact (bootstrap failed → exception applies). The upstream template's true primary language is SCSS, accounting for the full 58150 kB of template content.
language.rejected_candidate: HTML (initialization artifact only; full template content absent)

homepage.rationale: Destination homepage field is not set (bootstrap failed → exception applies). Upstream template carries the authoritative homepage URL.

license.rationale: Unchallenged — both github_api_live and github_api_live_upstream agree on MIT. github_api_live is cited as primary per convention.

topics.rationale: Destination topic list is empty (bootstrap failed → exception applies). Upstream carries 7 canonical topics describing the template's purpose and technology stack.

is_template.rationale: An instantiated destination repository should not itself be flagged as a GitHub template. github_api_live correctly reports false. The upstream value of true applies only to the source template repository.
is_template.rejected_candidate: true (upstream template status — not applicable to instantiated destination)

fork.rationale: Unchallenged — both sources agree on false. The destination was created as a standalone repository, not via GitHub's fork mechanism. Template instantiation failure does not equate to fork: true.

size.rationale: Destination size: 0 is the direct result of the bootstrap failure (exception applies). The upstream template size of 58150 kB represents the expected content footprint after a successful bootstrap.
size.rejected_candidate_note: Bootstrap failure marker — not the intended final state of the repository

scope_decision.rationale: Single authoritative source for this derived field. Destination repository exists (blocking prerequisite satisfied); upstream template is identified and accessible (is_template: true); bootstrap failure is documented and actionable.
